member.name: T:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Clients.GenericLlmClient
member.summary:
Single HTTP-based LLM client driven by a . Built-in profiles: anthropic, openai, ollama (loaded via LlmProviderProfileLoader). Add any new provider by supplying a profile JSON — no C# code required.
API key is resolved lazily on the first call to so DI registration remains synchronous and vault-backed key providers never block the startup thread.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Clients.GenericLlmClient.#ctor(Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile,System.String,System.Int32,System.Single,System.String,System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Convenience constructor with a pre-resolved key. Prefer the factory overload when the key comes from a secrets vault.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Clients.GenericLlmClient.#ctor(Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile,System.String,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.String}},System.String,System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Factory constructor — API key is resolved asynchronously on the first LLM call. Use this with vault-backed implementations.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Clients.GenericLlmClient.ParseToolCalls(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.DependencyInjection.LlmProviderServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLlmClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig)
member.summary: Registers an from a built-in provider profile. Supported providers: "anthropic", "openai", "ollama", "gemini", "mistral", "cohere". API key is resolved asynchronously on the first LLM call — DI registration is fully synchronous and safe in all hosting environments. Resolution order: ApiKey (literal) → ApiKeyEnvVar → ApiKeyFile → "{PROVIDER}_API_KEY" env var.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.DependencyInjection.LlmProviderServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLlmClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig,Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IApiKeyProvider)
member.summary: Registers an using a custom . Plug in Azure Key Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault, or any credential backend. The provider is called asynchronously on the first LLM call, not at startup.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.DependencyInjection.LlmProviderServiceCollectionExtensions.AddLlmClientFromProfile(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,Valaiorp.Configuration.Models.LlmConfig,Valaiorp.Core.Contracts.IApiKeyProvider)
member.summary: Registers an from a custom provider profile JSON file. Use this to add providers not built in (Gemini, Mistral, Cohere, etc.) without writing any C# code — just supply the profile JSON.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile.DefaultBaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL used when the caller does not supply one.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile.Endpoint
member.summary: Path portion of the completions endpoint, e.g. "/v1/messages".

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile.AuthHeader
member.summary: Header used to pass the API key. Value supports the {apiKey} placeholder, e.g. "Bearer {apiKey}". Null for providers that need no key (Ollama local).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile.FixedHeaders
member.summary: Additional static headers required by the provider, e.g. anthropic-version.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfile.SystemPosition
member.summary: "topLevel" — system prompt is sent as a separate top-level field (Anthropic). "firstMessage" — system prompt is the first message with role "system" (OpenAI, Ollama).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.AuthHeaderSpec.Value
member.summary: {apiKey} is replaced at runtime.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.RequestBodySpec.MaxTokensKey
member.summary: Null = omit max_tokens from the request (e.g. Ollama).

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.RequestBodySpec.TemperaturePath
member.summary: Dot-path to the temperature field. "temperature" = top level; "options.temperature" = nested under options.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.RequestBodySpec.FixedFields
member.summary: Extra static fields merged into the request body, e.g. {"stream": false}.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.ResponseMappingSpec.ContentPath
member.summary: Dot-path to the assistant text, e.g. "content.0.text" or "choices.0.message.content".

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfileLoader.LoadBuiltIn(System.String)
member.summary: Loads one of the built-in provider profiles (anthropic, openai, ollama). To add a new provider without writing C#, use instead.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfileLoader.LoadFromFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a provider profile from a JSON file on disk. Use this to add new providers (Gemini, Mistral, Cohere, etc.) without any C# code.

member.name: M:Valaiorp.LlmProviders.Profiles.LlmProviderProfileLoader.LoadFromJson(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a provider profile from a JSON string.
